:PROPERTIES:
:corpus-source:   Rector
:corpus-id:       R04
:corpus-severity: Important
:corpus-url:      https://doi.org/10.1007/978-3-540-30202-5_5
:corpus-citation: Rector et al. (2004), "OWL Pizzas", EKAW 2004, sec. 6 (Open-World Assumption and Closure Axioms); Horridge, CO-ODE Pizza Tutorial v1.5, ch. 6.
:corpus-expects:  planned/rector-missing-closure
:corpus-rationale: Defined class uses only an existential
 (hasTopping some VegetableTopping) without a closure axiom
 (hasTopping only VegetableTopping); under OWA, instances with
 unknown additional toppings are not excluded from membership in
 a class meant to be "vegetable-only".
:END:
#+title: Rector R04 -- missing closure axiom under open-world assumption

* corpus-r04

:ID: corpus-r04

:END:

 - rdfs:label :: "All-vegetable pizza"@en
 - EquivalentTo :: ex:hasTopping some ex:VegetableTopping
